name: LoomListPipelines
description: List the tenant's CSA Loom deployment pipelines (and their stage ids) so a pipeline can discover the ids it needs. Talks only to your own Loom Console.
helpMarkDown: Requires `loomPipelineCiEnabled=true` + a CI Bearer token. See tools/ado-loom-task/README.md.
author: CSA Loom

inputs.name: loomBaseUrl
inputs.label: Loom Console base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Your Loom Console origin, e.g. https://loom.contoso.com.

inputs.name: expectPipelineName
inputs.label: Expected pipeline name (optional)
inputs.helpMarkDown: When set, the task fails if no pipeline with this display name exists, and publishes its id as the matchedPipelineId output.

outputVariables.name: pipelineCount
outputVariables.description: Number of pipelines the tenant owns.

outputVariables.name: matchedPipelineId
outputVariables.description: Id of the pipeline matching expectPipelineName (when set).
